title: Nova (disambiguation)
content:
'''Nova''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
===Businesses===
*'''[[Nova Design Arms]]'''

===Phenomena===
*'''[[Nova]]e''', a type of [[Star|stellar]] eruption
*'''[[Pocket nova]]e''', ignitions of [[planet]]ary cores

===Organizations===
*The '[[Galactic Marines|''21st Nova Corps''']], a unit of the [[Grand Army of the Republic]]
*The '''[[Ailon Nova Guard]]''', an ancient mercenary unit
*The '''[[Nova Crime Syndicate]]'''
*The '''[[Nova Demons]]''', a gang
*The '''[[Nova Razors]]''', a [[spice]] gang

===Starships===
*The "'''[[Nova (Vector)|''Nova'']]'''", a [[Jedi Vector]] used by [[Loden Greatstorm]] and [[Bell Zettifar]]
*The '''[[NovaSword]]''', a [[starfighter]] model

===Other===
*[[Nova (clone trooper)|'''Nova''']], a [[Clone trooper|clone stormtrooper]]
*The '''[[NOVA40 Plasma Grenade]]'''
*The '''[[Nova Blaster]]''', a drink served at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]
*The '''[[Nova Star]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] award
*The '''[[Nova Sundari-style hairdo]]'''
*'''[[Rally point Nova]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] rendezvous point

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Nova/Legends|Novae]]''', a type of [[Star/Legends|stellar]] eruption

===Businesses===
*'''[[Nova (news network)|Nova]]''', a news network
*'''[[Novacom]]''', an [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] provider
*'''[[NovaCORE]]'''
*'''[[Nova Designs Incorporated]]''', an arms manufacturer
*'''[[Nova-Drive]]''', a small [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]-based [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer
*'''[[NovaNetwork]]''', a news agency
*The '''[[Novastar Corporation]]'''
*'''[[Nova-Tech]]''', a [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] manufacturer

===Individuals===
*'''[[Nova (assassin)|Nova]]''', an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]
*'''[[Nova Stihl]]''', an [[Imperial Marines/Legends|Imperial Marine]]
*'''[[Jonas Nova]]''', a businessman
*'''Captain [[Nova (captain)|Nova]]''', a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]

===Locations===
*The '''[[Coronet Nova Steakhouse]]'''
*'''[[Dark Nova]]''', a bar
*The '''[[Denarii Nova]]''', a [[Binary star/Legends|binary star]]
*The '''[[Miele Nova system/Legends|Miele Nova system]]'''
**'''[[Miele Nova]]'''
*The '''[[NovaCORE kelerium processing plant]]''' on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*The '''[[Nova Level]]''' on Coruscant
*The '''[[Nova Nova]]''', a [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]]
*The '[[Nova Vaults of Kakitai bel Toyouin|''Nova Vaults''']] on [[Tartaglia]]
*The '''[[Triple Nova Casino]]''', a [[Casino/Legends|casino]] on [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]]

===Mercenary units===
*The '''[[Ailon Nova Guard/Legends|Ailon Nova Guard]]''', a mercenary group based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Ailon
*'''[[Nova Force]]''', a mercenary unit led by [[Willum Kamaran]]
*The '''[[Nova Guard]]''', a mercenary unit from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]
*'''[[Star's Nova]]'''

===Military units===
*The '''21st Nova Corps''', later known as the '''[[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]]'''
*'[[Dark Novatrooper|''Dark novatroopers''']], an advanced [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]] variant
*'''[[Nova Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] squadron
*The '''[[Nova Core]]''', a New Republic organization for elite [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] within the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]]
**'''[[Nova Scout]]s''', members of the group
*'''[[Novatrooper]]s''', a mysterious group of warriors said to wear black [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]]
*'''[[Task Force Nova]]'''

===Organizations===
*'''[[Crimson Nova]]''', a chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]
*The '''[[Nova Blades]]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang
*The '''[[NovaCluster Players]]''', an acting troupe
*The '''[[Nova Demons/Legends|Nova Demons]]''', a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bike gang

===Space stations===
*'''[[Nova 3]]''', a Rebel Alliance [[Space station/Legends|space station]]
*'''[[Nova Orion Station]]''', a space station in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]
*'''[[Nova Station]]''', a space station in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]

===Starships===
====Individual ships====
*The '''''[[Indupar Nova]]''''', a [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]
*The '''''[[Kestrel Nova]]''''', a pirate [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] captured by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]]
*The '''[[Nova (Galactic Republic)|''Nova'']]''', a [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]
*The '''[[Nova (New Republic)|''Nova'']]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]]-cruiser
*The '''''[[Nova Defiant/Legends|Nova Defiant]]''''', a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]]
*The '''''[[NovaFlare]]''''', a Rebel corvette
*The '''''[[Nova Prince]]''''', a ship used by the [[Red Nebula exiles|exiles]] of the [[Red Nebula/Legends|Red Nebula]]
*The '''''[[Nova Whisper]]''''', a modified [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 Short Hauler]]
*'''''[[Nova Viper]]''''', the ship owned by [[Spurch Goa]]
*The '''''[[Nova's Heart]]''''', [[Javul Charn]]'s [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]]
*The '''''[[Red Nova]]''''', a pirate cruiser affiliated with the [[Invids]]
====Classes====
*The '''[[Nova-class battle cruiser|''Nova''-class battle cruiser]]'''
*The '''[[NovaDive]]'''
*The '''[[NovaSword Space Superiority Fighter]]'''
*The '''[[YKL-37R Nova Courier]]'''

===Weapons and technology===
*The '''[[D-400 Nova Carbine]]'''
*The '''[[E-410 Nova Disintegrator]]'''
*The '''[[M-400 Nova Rifle]]'''
*The '''[[M-500 Nova Disintegrator]]'''
*The '[[NOVA40 Plasma Grenade/Legends|''NOVA40 plasma grenade''']]
*'''[[Nova bomb]]s'''
*The '''[[Nova Crusader]]''', a portable [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]]
*The '''[[Nova Edge Sword]]'''
*The '''[[NovaFury MonoThruster]]''', a model of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]]
*The '''[[nova generator]]''', a type of weapon
*The '''[[Nova Interceptor]]''', a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]
*The '''[[Nova Needler]]''', a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistol
*The '''[[Nova Projector]]''', a portable blaster cannon
*The '''[[Nova Shrieker]]''', a blaster pistol
*The '''[[Nova-Tech Powersuit]]'''
*The '''[[S-402 Nova Rifle]]'''

===Awards===
*The '''[[Nova Award]]'''
*The '[[Nova Star/Legends|''Nova Star Medal of the Empire''']]

===Other===
*The '''[[NOVA]]''' project
*'''[[Novacrown/Legends|Novacrown]]''', a board game
*'''[[Nova flare]]''', an anti-[[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] tactic
*The '''[[Novahawk]]''', symbol of [[Rebel privateer]]s
*'''[[Novajack]]''', a type of [[Spice/Legends|spice]]
*The '''[[nova lily]]'''
*'''[[Nova processing center]]s'''
*'''[[Nova ruby|Nova rubies]]''', rare [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstones]]
*'''[[Nova Starlight]]''', a [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]]
*'''[[Nova Strider]]''', a [[walker]]
*'''[[Operation Grand Nova]]'''
*The '''[[Sith Nova Holocron]]'''
